The '''Destruction of the ''Scythe'' convoy''' was a [[Hit-and-hype raiding|hit and fade]] attack that was conducted on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoy by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] that took place in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==Background==
Following the Alliance's [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|defeat]] at [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], the [[Defiance Task Force]] led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nammo]] needed to reach the rest of the Alliance fleet without being detected or destroyed by the [[Corrupter Task Force]]. As a first step, Nammo planned to destroy an Imperial supply convoy led by the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] [[Scythe (Strike-class)|''Scythe'']] so the Empire's forces would be stretched thin by the movements of the [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']] and her task force.

[[File:B1m1dogfight.jpg|thumb|left|150px|TIEs attempt to stop the Y-wing assault.]]

==Battle==
Jumping through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to the convoy's last known location, the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] of [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Group]] moved to attack the [[Veltnor|convoy ships]], with four of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Group's]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], including [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], as escorts. In two waves, six [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] were quickly launched from the ''Scythe'' with the Y-wings as their targets, but were engaged by Red Group, allowing Green Group to devastate the convoy with a [[Missile/Legends|missile]] barrage, disabling most of its [[Starship/Legends|ships]] and leaving the rest in preparations to flee into hyperspace. In response, the ''Scythe'' deployed its remaining six TIE fighters in three waves, destroying a single Y-wing before being eliminated by Red Group. With the Strike [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] damaged and on the run, the convoy disintegrated and the Rebels returned to the ''Defiance''.<ref name="AllianceSG" />

==Aftermath==
The attack on the convoy resulted in a greater local Imperial focus on protecting convoys and remote units rather than actively searching for the Rebels. Admiral Nammo, meanwhile, organized a [[Recon on Corrupter Task Force|recon mission]] to determine what exactly the ''Defiance'' group was up against.

==Behind the scenes==
While the destruction of the convoy is assured, the ''Scythe'' itself can either survive, be driven off, or be destroyed depending on player actions.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
